subject: Your Mail Plus plan is changing to Yahoo Mail Pro
body:
[https://email.communications.yahoo.com/t/gbH1AAebJoG1V-gCQBTCoL4GsE4GG6aCFHpBBDBXS6aaaaESL6BNCA1Koaa?p=zav~25yE~25yEx~2566~2566KQM9~2566~2566YPYVLKQSO9KDb6bEFEW8OUB670__nailvknagp~256zBk~amp;h=fiatnsfiYx~2504uedsk.gkq~amp;h=]

Yahoo [https://s.yimg.com/dh/ap/us/crm/12709/logo.jpg]

[http://f.chtah.com/i/41/488073967/1x1.gif] Hi Jeffrey,
[http://f.chtah.com/i/41/488073967/1x1.gif]

We are updating our existing subscription plans and replacing your existing Mail
Plus plan with our new Yahoo Mail Pro plan. With Yahoo Mail Pro, you get all of
the same benefits you’ve come to enjoy, like an ad-free inbox and priority
customer support.

In 45 days, your account will be automatically upgraded to Yahoo Mail Pro.
Because you are long-standing subscriber, we are providing your first year of
Yahoo Mail Pro for only $19.99 at your next renewal date. After the first year,
your subscription will continue at the regular price of $34.99/year. Should you
decide to cancel Yahoo Mail Pro, your subscription will end at your next renewal
date, at which time your Yahoo Mail will revert to the ad supported experience.

If you do not want to switch to Yahoo Mail Pro, you may cancel your current Mail
Plus subscription from within your account settings
[http://payments.mail.yahoo.com/]. You can also access your account settings by
finding Yahoo Mail Pro in the Settings area of your inbox.

We hope that you will continue enjoying the benefits of our paid subscription
service and join the Yahoo Mail Pro family!

The Yahoo Mail Pro team Yahoo [https://s.yimg.com/dh/ap/us/crm/12709/line.png]  

Can't view images? View as a webpage
[https://email.communications.yahoo.com/t/gfH1AAebJoG1V-gCQBTCoL4GsE4GG6aCFHpBBDBXS6aaaaESL6BNCA1KoaaE4GG6CFHp?p=zav~25yE~25yEx~2566~2566KQM9~2566~2566YPYVLKQSO9KDb6bEFEW8OUB670__nailvknagp~256zBk~amp;h=fiatnsfiYx~2504uedsk.gkq~amp;b=nailvknagp~258w2Wlks.Ysi~amp;p=N5PIk~amp;1=~amp;n=lpxlw://uedsk.gkq/rmX].
 

Privacy Policy
[https://email.communications.yahoo.com/t/gcH1AAebJoG1V-gCQBTCoL4GsE4GG6aCFHpBBDBXS6aaaaESL6BNCA1Koaa?p=zav~25yE~25yEx~2566~2566KQM9~2566~2566YPYVLKQSO9KDb6bEFEW8OUB670__nailvknagp~256zBk~amp;h=fiatnsfiYx~2504uedsk.gkq~amp;h=LW~amp;1=]
body_html:
Hi Jeffrey,
We are updating our existing subscription plans and replacing your existing Mail Plus plan with our new Yahoo Mail Pro plan. With Yahoo Mail Pro, you get all of the same benefits you’ve come to enjoy, like an ad-free inbox and priority customer support.

In 45 days, your account will be automatically upgraded to Yahoo Mail Pro. Because you are long-standing subscriber, we are providing your first year of Yahoo Mail Pro for only $19.99 at your next renewal date. After the first year, your subscription will continue at the regular price of $34.99/year. Should you decide to cancel Yahoo Mail Pro, your subscription will end at your next renewal date, at which time your Yahoo Mail will revert to the ad supported experience.

If you do not want to switch to Yahoo Mail Pro, you may cancel your current Mail Plus subscription from within your account settings. You can also access your account settings by finding Yahoo Mail Pro in the Settings area of your inbox.

We hope that you will continue enjoying the benefits of our paid subscription service and join the Yahoo Mail Pro family!

The Yahoo Mail Pro team
